SPIN & SPEAK

Unit 1 · Oral Practice · Tools, Devices & Jobs
🔩 10 Tools + 6 Devices 👷 7 Technical Jobs
⚡
STEP 1 What is this? / What are these?
STEP 2 It / They also…?
STEP 3 Who use(s) it / them and for what?
STEP 4 What does it / they NOT do?
